mapper.insert: insert into users (openid, name, password, sex, phone, idCard, roleId, createTime) values (#{openid},#{name},#{password},#{sex},#{phone},#{idCard},#{roleId},#{createTime})
mapper.select:
select * from users
password is not null and name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
mapper.insert: insert into users (openid, name, password, sex, phone, idCard, roleId, createTime) values (#{openid},#{name},#{password},#{sex},#{phone},#{idCard},#{roleId},#{createTime})
